'''hajoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilman|oilman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilman|oilman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hajoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæjeyeth|hæjeyeth]] || [[word:hæjeyej|hæjeyej]] || [[word:hæjeyesh|hæjeyesh]] || [[word:hæjeye|hæjeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hajojoyoth|hajojoyoth]] || [[word:hajojoyoj|hajojoyoj]] || [[word:hajojoyosh|hajojoyosh]] || [[word:hajojoyo|hajojoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hajoyoth|hajoyoth]] || [[word:hajoyoj|hajoyoj]] || [[word:hajoyosh|hajoyosh]] || [[word:hajoyo|hajoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hajofyoth|hajofyoth]] || [[word:hajofyoj|hajofyoj]] || [[word:hajofyosh|hajofyosh]] || [[word:hajofyof|hajofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hajoyotho|hajoyotho]] || [[word:hajoyojo|hajoyojo]] || [[word:hajoyosho|hajoyosho]] || [[word:hajoyoko|hajoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hajoyoth|hajoyoth]] || [[word:hajoyoj|hajoyoj]] || [[word:hajoyosh|hajoyosh]] || [[word:hajoyo|hajoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hajoyothol|hajoyothol]] || [[word:hajoyojol|hajoyojol]] || [[word:hajoyoshol|hajoyoshol]] || [[word:hajoyokol|hajoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hajoyothotho|hajoyothotho]] || [[word:hajoyojojo|hajoyojojo]] || [[word:hajoyoshosho|hajoyoshosho]] || [[word:hajoyoko|hajoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hajoyothon|hajoyothon]] || [[word:hajoyojon|hajoyojon]] || [[word:hajoyoshon|hajoyoshon]] || [[word:hajoyokon|hajoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hajoyothoro|hajoyothoro]] || [[word:hajoyojoro|hajoyojoro]] || [[word:hajoyoshoro|hajoyoshoro]] || [[word:hajoyokoro|hajoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
